requirement_topic.en: KEPCO Grid Connection and Electrical Service Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: KEPCO 电网接入及供电要求
requirement_topic.zht: KEPCO 電網接入及供電要求

summary.en: EV charging sites in South Korea must be acceptable to the local grid connection process, typically involving Korea Electric Power Corporation (KEPCO) service capacity, metering, transformer, protection, demand, and tariff requirements. Product certification alone does not approve the site connection. Higher-power DC charging can require separate service review, protection coordination, load calculation, and utility approval before energisation.
summary.zh: 韩国电动汽车充电站点须通过当地电网接入流程，通常涉及韩国电力公社（KEPCO）的供电容量、计量、变压器、保护、需量及电价要求。产品认证本身并不批准站点接电。较大功率直流充电可能需要在送电前进行单独供电审查、保护配合、负荷计算及电力公司批准。
summary.zht: 韓國電動汽車充電站點須通過當地電網接入流程，通常涉及韓國電力公社（KEPCO）的供電容量、計量、變壓器、保護、需量及電價要求。產品認證本身並不批准站點接電。較大功率直流充電可能需要在送電前進行單獨供電審查、保護配合、負荷計算及電力公司批准。

standards_or_laws: KEPCO electric service and interconnection requirements
Korean electrical installation rules for EV charging sites

summary.en: China charging sites are commonly designed under Chinese building, distribution and charging-infrastructure standards such as GB 50966 and GB/T 51313, and coordinated with Chinese distribution utilities. These site documents do not establish KEPCO service availability or Korean grid acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国充电站点通常依据 GB 50966、GB/T 51313 等中国建筑、配电及充电基础设施标准设计，并与中国配电企业协调。这些站点文件不能证明 KEPCO 供电可用性或韩国电网接入许可。
summary.zht: 中國充電站點通常依據 GB 50966、GB/T 51313 等中國建築、配電及充電基礎設施標準設計，並與中國配電企業協調。這些站點文件不能證明 KEPCO 供電可用性或韓國電網接入許可。

gap.en: A Korea deployment package should separate product KC evidence from site-grid evidence. The importer or installer must confirm KEPCO capacity, transformer and metering arrangements, protection settings, earthing, demand management, and applicable tariff or charging-service account setup. Chinese site design drawings and GB installation assumptions need Korean electrical-engineer review.
gap.zh: 韩国部署资料包应区分产品 KC 证据与站点电网证据。进口商或安装方须确认 KEPCO 供电容量、变压器和计量安排、保护整定、接地、需量管理以及适用电价或充电服务账户设置。中国站点设计图纸及 GB 安装假设需由韩国电气工程专业人员复核。
gap.zht: 韓國部署資料包應區分產品 KC 證據與站點電網證據。進口商或安裝方須確認 KEPCO 供電容量、變壓器和計量安排、保護整定、接地、需量管理以及適用電價或充電服務帳戶設置。中國站點設計圖紙及 GB 安裝假設需由韓國電氣工程專業人員覆核。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory practical gate for energising the Korean site; exact documents depend on site size, service type, local installation and KEPCO process.
mandatory_status.cn: China utility and GB installation approvals do not replace KEPCO acceptance.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KC approval does not energise a charging site. Korea deployments need KEPCO-compatible grid connection, metering and protection review in addition to product-level compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】KC 批准并不等于站点可送电。韩国部署除产品层面合规外，还需要满足 KEPCO 电网接入、计量及保护审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】KC 批准並不等於站點可送電。韓國部署除產品層面合規外，還需要滿足 KEPCO 電網接入、計量及保護審查。
